case_title: LO, FONG VS GOMES, JACKSON B. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,808.00 FILED BY LO, FONG AS TO DEFENDANT GOMES, JACKSON B. MACHADO, CAIRO B FARIS, JORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LO, FONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMES, JACKSON B. MACHADO, CAIRO B FARIS, JORGE $1,808.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,823.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO JACKSON GOMES RETURNED NOT AT THIS ADDRESS.
